channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Toronto Maple Leafs secure first overall pick, Winnipeg Jets to pick eighth in 2026 NHL Draft
item.description: The NHL Draft Lottery concluded on Tuesday with the Toronto Maple Leafs winning the first overall pick in the 2026 NHL Draft. The Maple Leafs, who had an 8.5 per cent chance of securing the top spot, ...

item.title: Mahesh Jethmalani Comments on Mamata Banerjee's Decision to Remain in Office
item.description: The news article appears to discuss senior lawyer Mahesh Jethmalani's remarks on West Bengal Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee's statement that she will not resign from her position. Jethmalani has repor...

item.title: Antigua and Barbuda ministers now pledge allegiance to the nation instead of the British monarch
item.description: Antigua and Barbuda has sworn in a new Cabinet following the recent electoral victory of Prime Minister Gaston Browne's Antigua and Barbuda Labour Party (ABLP), which secured an unprecedented fourth c...

item.title: Carney government prioritizes results-based approach over legislating nature protection targets
item.description: Despite holding a parliamentary majority, Prime Minister Mark Carney’s government has no current plans to pass legislation that would enshrine commitments to protect Canada’s waters and lands, accordi...

item.title: Matthew McConaughey's Solo Journey to Peru Helped Him Reflect During Early Fame
item.description: Matthew McConaughey shared on the 'No Magic Pill' podcast that he took a 22-day solo trip to Peru at the start of his career to confront personal struggles and reflect on his life. During this period,...

item.title: How a Death Course Inspired My Latest Novel
item.description: Sarah Clutton recounts the challenging process of writing her latest novel, 'The Bookshop of Buried Pasts'. At 51, she faced the daunting task of creating a book under contract without a single idea. ...

item.title: Hantavirus suspected on MV Hondius polar expedition, several fatalities reported
item.description: The MV Hondius, a 107-metre polar expedition vessel designed for Arctic and Antarctic voyages, is currently off the coast of Cape Verde following a suspected hantavirus outbreak. Unlike typical cruise...

item.title: Trump suspends Project Freedom in the Strait of Hormuz to allow diplomatic talks with Iran
item.description: President Donald Trump has announced a temporary pause in Project Freedom, a United States initiative intended to reopen the Strait of Hormuz to international shipping. The operation, unveiled by his ...

item.title: Arsenal edge Atletico Madrid to book Champions League final spot after 19-year wait
item.description: Arsenal have secured a place in the UEFA Champions League final for only the second time in their history after a hard-fought 1-0 victory over Atletico Madrid at the Emirates Stadium, sealing a 2-1 ag...

item.title: Saskatchewan imposes fire bans amid rising wildfire risk and recent grass fires
item.description: Fire bans are being implemented across parts of Saskatchewan as dry, warm, and windy conditions increase the risk of wildfires. A recent fast-moving grass fire near Radisson highlighted the danger, bu...

item.title: Delhi government initiates inquiry after lapses found in Vivek Vihar fire response
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Rekha Gupta has ordered a magisterial inquiry into the tragic fire incident in East Delhi’s Vivek Vihar that claimed nine lives, including that of a toddler. The fire broke out in...

item.title: Nigeria Urges Full Investigation Into Deaths of Citizens Amid Rising Xenophobia in South Africa
item.description: The Nigerian government has called for a thorough and impartial investigation into the deaths of two Nigerian citizens in South Africa following violent anti-immigrant protests. The deceased, Nnaemeka...

item.title: Young Gamer Opens Gaming Hub to Teach Skills and Create Jobs in Ekurhuleni
item.description: Thabang 'Wadikwena' Moshoeshoe, a young gamer from Springs in Ekurhuleni, is transforming his love for video games into a platform for youth development and job creation. Operating a gaming hub inside...

item.title: Simon Cowell opens up on grief after Liam Payne's death and the pressures of fame
item.description: Simon Cowell has spoken candidly about the emotional toll of Liam Payne's death, revealing he took time away from filming a Netflix documentary to cope with the tragedy. Payne, the former One Directio...

item.title: Knicks Dominate with Consecutive Blowout Victories to Become Eastern Conference Favourites
item.description: The New York Knicks have surged in the 2025 NBA playoffs, securing three consecutive postseason victories by margins of at least 25 points, a first in league history. After overcoming an initial defic...

item.title: Kim Cattrall Discusses Her Shopping Habits, Favourite Foods, and Home Life
item.description: Kim Cattrall, renowned for her iconic role as Samantha Jones in 'Sex and the City', shares insights into her personal shopping habits and lifestyle. She enjoys food shopping and often visits Marks & S...

item.title: Passengers with suspected hantavirus to be evacuated from MV Hondius
item.description: Authorities are preparing to evacuate passengers from the cruise ship MV Hondius after reports of suspected hantavirus infections onboard. The incident has raised health concerns due to the potentiall...

item.title: ADC announces lower nomination fees and updated schedule for 2026 primaries
item.description: The African Democratic Congress (ADC) don release new timetable plus reduce their nomination fees for the 2026 primaries. According to their National Publicity Secretary, Bolaji Abdullahi, dem make th...

item.title: Australian authorities prepare for return of IS-linked families from Syria
item.description: Thirteen Australians with connections to the Islamic State, including four women and nine children, have reportedly made plans to return to Australia from camps in northern Syria. Home Affairs Ministe...

item.title: Kate prepares for first international royal visit following cancer treatment
item.description: The Duchess of Cambridge, Kate, is set to make her first official overseas royal visit since undergoing treatment for cancer. This marks an important milestone in her public duties, demonstrating both...
